query:
INSERT INTO `membershipPackages` (name, durationMonths, monthlyPrice, totalPrice, registrationFee, downPayment, description, benefits, invitationOnly, isActive) VALUES
('Foundation', 12, 150.00, 2339.00, 99.00, 295.00, '12-month program for beginners to build a strong martial arts foundation', '["1 White Traditional Karate Gi", "2x 30min Martial Arts Classes Weekly", "$49 Certification Fee", "Access to Basic Curriculum", "Progression Tracking"]', 0, 1),
('Black Belt', 36, 200.00, 8700.00, 99.00, 295.00, '36-month comprehensive program to achieve Black Belt mastery', '["1 Traditional Red Karate Gi", "3x 60min Martial Arts Classes Weekly", "$49 Certification Fee", "Access to Advance Curriculum", "Community Events", "Guest Seminars"]', 0, 1),
('Leadership', 12, 250.00, 3000.00, 99.00, 295.00, 'Invitation-only elite program for advanced students and future instructors', '["1 Traditional Black Karate Gi", "Unlimited Classes Weekly", "$49 Certification Fee", "Community Events", "Guest Seminars", "Competition Support", "Leadership Classes & Seminars", "Access to exclusive Leadership Curriculum"]', 1, 1);
